markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Manus inherited context from a senior residences research task and created a comprehensive metrics dashboard quantifying the research efforts across 6 previous dashboards. The dashboard visualizes 347 websites analyzed, 1,105 pages consulted, equivalent to 354 hours of human work. After initial deployment issues, the dashboard was successfully corrected and deployed at https://kbrmlgjl.manus.space with professional gray-tone design and interactive visualizations.


## Context & Intent

To create a meta-analysis dashboard showing the depth and volume of research conducted across multiple senior living dashboards, demonstrating AI efficiency compared to human research time


## What Was Done

Inherited task context, created metrics dashboard with gray design theme, deployed web service, troubleshooted deployment issues, and provided comprehensive quantification of research efforts


## Outputs Produced

- [web_dashboard] Research Metrics Dashboard — Interactive dashboard with 4 tabs showing research volume, methodology, and AI efficiency metrics
- [deployment] Web Service — Public web deployment at https://kbrmlgjl.manus.space with responsive design

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Use gray color scheme for professional appearance
- Quantify research effort in human-equivalent hours
- Include multiple visualization types (bars, areas, progress bars)
- Deploy as public web service for accessibility

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Task inheritance system functioned properly
- Comprehensive metrics provided clear value demonstration
- Web deployment recovery was efficient
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial deployment had technical issues requiring correction
Discoveries:

- Total research equivalent: 354 hours across 347 websites and 1,105 pages
- AI efficiency demonstrated as 59x faster than human research

## Challenges & Blockers

- Initial web deployment failure
- Required troubleshooting and redeployment

## Open Questions

- Long-term accessibility of deployed dashboard
- Additional metrics that could enhance the visualization

## Next Steps

- Monitor dashboard performance
- Consider adding more detailed breakdown of research methodologies
- Potential integration with other research projects
---
